name: Pistachio
summary: A green nut that's among the highest in the eye-protecting carotenoids lutein and zeaxanthin, with heart-healthy fats and protein.

benefits.claim: Among the highest-lutein nuts for eye health
benefits.mechanism: Pistachios' green colour comes partly from lutein and zeaxanthin — the carotenoids that concentrate in the retina to filter blue light and protect against age-related macular degeneration. Pistachios contain more of them than other common nuts.

citations.title: Lutein + zeaxanthin and omega-3 fatty acids for age-related macular degeneration: the AREDS2 randomized clinical trial (JAMA 2013)

benefits.mechanism: Pistachios pair monounsaturated fat and fiber — which help lower LDL cholesterol when they replace refined snacks — with more protein than most nuts. In the PREDIMED trial, nut-supplemented diets reduced cardiovascular events.

citations.title: Primary prevention of cardiovascular disease with a Mediterranean diet supplemented with extra-virgin olive oil or nuts (Estruch et al., PREDIMED, N Engl J Med 2018)

surprisingFacts.text: Buying pistachios in the shell makes you eat more slowly and see the empty shells pile up — studies find this 'evidence-based' portion cue leads people to eat fewer calories.
